TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Bubun, title = Bubun, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bubun} }

S.FORM: bubun Itiniay i Ren'ai Cen no Nantou ko bubun a niyaro', 191 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 499 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 81% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 403 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 19% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 96 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal76%, Seediq1%, Bunun1%, Amis2%, Hla'alua1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: b~b~vo~u~ub~b~vo~u~un itiniaj i rənʡai ʦən no~u nanto~uo~u~u ko~u b~b~vo~u~ub~b~vo~u~un a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, səəɬ~ɮi**%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, amis*%, ħɾaʡaɾo~u~ua*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: bubun Itiniay i Ren'ai Cen no Nantou ko bubun a niyaro', 191 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 499 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 81% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 403 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 19% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 96 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal76%, Seediq1%, Bunun1%, Amis2%, Hla'alua1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: b~b~vo~u~ub~b~vo~u~un itiniaj i rənʡai ʦən no~u nanto~uo~u~u ko~u b~b~vo~u~ub~b~vo~u~un a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, səəɬ~ɮi**%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, amis*%, ħɾaʡaɾo~u~ua*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
